perf_hint: one wedge and one lattice read per pixel — among the cheapest presets; the resolution is the only cost

params.name: side
params.description: Which top corner the light enters from.

params.name: tilt
params.description: How steeply the shaft falls: 0.1 hugs the top edge, 1.0 drops straight down.

params.name: width
params.description: How wide the shaft is at its waist, as a fraction of the short edge.

params.name: reach
params.description: How far the light carries before it dies.

params.name: sway
params.description: How much the shaft sways, almost imperceptibly, as if hung.

params.name: dust
params.description: How much dust drifts visibly inside the light.

params.name: lift
params.description: How much a hit lifts the lamp, gently.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the shaft.
